title: Repealed
doc_html:
Art. 348. Repealed by Acts 2016, No. 613, §4, eff. Jan. 1, 2017.

            Acts 1993, No. 834, §1, eff. June 22, 1993; Acts 2016, No. 613, §4, eff. Jan. 1, 2017.
